name: Fiesta Potato Salad Olé
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Red Potatoes, to be cooked, peeled, and cubed
2/3 cup Canned Black Beans, rinsed and drained
1/3 cup Green Onions with Tops, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked, cubed potatoes and 1-1/2 cups of shredded cheese.
2. Add diced red bell pepper, rinsed and drained canned black beans, celery, jicama, green onions, chopped cilantro, and salt to the bowl. Mix gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
3. In a separate small bowl, combine the fat-free ranch dressing and chunky salsa. Pour this mixture over the potato mixture in the large bowl.
4. Toss gently until everything is well coated with the dressing and salsa.
5. Chill the salad for at least 1 hour before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
6. Just before serving, top each serving with the remaining 1/2 cup of shredded cheese.
7. Garnish with fresh cilantro sprigs if desired.
Yield: 12 servings.
